title: Origins & links — admit the MagicDNS/HTTPS origin everywhere a browser->backend or cross-surface call is gated, close the cross-surface link ejects, and land the bounded platform-family patch tail via the EXISTING rext sha-pinned mechanism: extend CORS_EXTRA_ORIGINS emission, studio-desk runtime redirects + the VITE_CLERK_SIGN_IN_URL bake gap, a NEW apply-ant-academy-dev-origins.sh for ant-academy allowedDevOrigins, and the conditional next-web urls.ts (documented residual). Delivers the NEW corpus/ops/demo/tailscale-serve.md remote-access recipe. All gated on --public-host, byte-identical when unset; config/generation + unit tests only (the live cross-machine run is M215).
kind: the v2.2 'panorama' M214 (CORS + cross-surface links + patch tail) milestone — Python + bash in rext tooling (stack-injection/gen_injected_override.py + apply-ant-academy-dev-origins.sh NEW; demo-stack/up-injected.sh + ant-academy.sh + patches/ant-academy-dev-origins/). ZERO platform-repo edits (two platform-family files ride the existing sha-pinned patch mechanism on the demo's EPHEMERAL clone). Code-of-record: rext tag panorama-m214 @ 99c86b7 (FROZEN at close — rext re-tag reserved for /developer-kit:close-release). The rosetta m214 branch carries plan/doc + the NEW corpus/ops/demo/tailscale-serve.md recipe + cross-ref updates (rosetta_demo.md, frontend-tier.md, clerkenstein.md, demo/README.md).

tests.language: python (pytest) + bash; M214 touched ZERO Go and ZERO TS
tests.counts_source: authoritative — pytest --junit-xml per section (junit-stack-injection.xml + junit-demo-stack.xml), exit-code-gated; cross-checked against net-new `def test_` counts in the diff.
tests.python_delta: stack-injection 152 (M213) -> 155 (+3 test_injection funcs: browser_scheme + the https CORS trio + scheme-flipped studio-desk redirects). demo-stack 367 (M213) -> 383 (+16 net-new funcs: +12 test_ant_academy [-1] the patch apply/revert/drift-refuse/error paths + +6 test_frontend_build [-1] the studio-desk VITE overlay/.dockerignore trap + never-clobber). The M213->M214 progression is clean: demo-stack 350(M212)->367(M213)->383(M214); stack-injection 130(M212)->152(M213)->155(M214).
tests.close_added_test: none — the close is rosetta docs+plan only; it surfaced no defect requiring a new regression test. The 3 adversarial scenarios (ADV-1..ADV-3 in decisions.md) are each already handled and pinned by build/harden tests (the ant-academy clone-independent refusal tests + the studio-desk failed-build trap-revert + never-clobber tests added at harden Pass 1).
tests.shellcheck: clean at harden (shellcheck unavailable on the close box; py_compile clean at close via python3.12).
tests.flake_gate: 5/5 clean. Both milestone-touched suites re-run 5x sequentially (one suite at a time = realistic CI condition; pytest-randomly not installed -> deterministic intra-suite order): stack-injection 147p/8s identical each run; demo-stack 383p/0s identical each run. 0 failures across all 10 runs.

coverage.note: harden Pass 1 (recorded in progress.md). The Python surface (gen_injected_override.py browser_scheme + CORS/redirect emission) was already at 99% statements (sole miss = the uncoverable __main__ entrypoint). The milestone's declared TOP RISKS are shell-behavioral (trap-safety + drift-refuse), which pytest-cov doesn't instrument — harden deepened those two shell surfaces directly with +5 behavioral tests (studio-desk failed-build overlay+dockerignore trap-revert & never-clobber; the ant-academy helper's clone-independent refusal contract).
coverage.shell_surfaces: up-injected.sh studio-desk builder trap + apply-ant-academy-dev-origins.sh refusal paths — behavioral coverage deepened at harden

delivered.cors_emission: gen_injected_override.py browser_scheme(host) predicate: the offset localhost trio is ALWAYS emitted (byte-identical); a public MagicDNS host ADDS the https://$HOST:{3000,3001,9000}+off trio to CORS_EXTRA_ORIGINS. cors.go honors it in non-production (backend runs ENVIRONMENT=development). D-SCHEME-1.
delivered.studio_desk_redirects: gen_injected_override.py emits studio-desk CLERK_SIGN_IN_URL/WEB_APP_URL requireAuth fallback at {scheme}://{host}:3000+off (was hardcoded http://localhost). D-SCHEME-1.
delivered.vite_signin_bake: the ONE client bake gap: VITE_CLERK_SIGN_IN_URL has no Dockerfile ARG (a platform edit), so config.ts fell back to the un-offset http://localhost:3000/login. up-injected.sh bakes it via a gitignored .env.production.local overlay (vite production mode loads it) admitted past studio-desk's .env* .dockerignore by a TRANSIENT !.env.production.local re-include; both reverted on the RETURN trap (clone left git-clean). Fixes the un-offset :3000 for EVERY demo; https for a public host. D-VITE-SIGNIN-1.
delivered.ant_academy_patch: NEW apply-ant-academy-dev-origins.sh + demo-stack/patches/ant-academy-dev-origins/ant-academy-dev-origins.yaml: admit the demo's MagicDNS host into next.config.js allowedDevOrigins (which hardcodes a DIFFERENT tailnet host, blocking `next dev` cross-origin requests). Env-var indirection (allowedDevOrigins reads ANT_ACADEMY_ALLOWED_DEV_ORIGIN, prepended to the kept originals) so the source change is STATIC (fixed post_sha256) and the host arrives at `next dev` launch. sha-pinned drift-refuse + single-occurrence anchor + idempotent + post-condition re-check; applied by ant-academy.sh before launch (gated on the public host), reverted on --stop. NON-FATAL. Mirrors apply-app-authz-skip.sh; the canonical repo is never touched. D-PATCH-1.
delivered.scheme_flip: up-injected.sh + ant-academy.sh SCHEME var (mirrors browser_scheme): every baked browser URL (NEXT_PUBLIC_* / VITE_* endpoints, _STUDIO_URL/_ACADEMY_URL/_PUBLIC_WEBSITE_URL, the cache-validators want_ep, the demo_web content-URL rewrite, the cockpit [Log in as]/[Academy] deep-links) is $SCHEME://$HOST:<offsetport> — http on localhost (byte-identical), https for a public host. The image cache-validators embed $SCHEME (D-REBUILD-1 extended) so an http-baked image rebuilds under an https host. Confirms the two shipped demopatches (next-web-studio-url + next-web-public-website-url) carry the MagicDNS value cleanly.
delivered.mixed_content_check: under HTTPS-everywhere no browser-facing call resolves to plain http:// — the scheme flip covers every baked endpoint/redirect/cross-surface link; the asset plane stays prod-HTTPS (already allowlisted in next.config remotePatterns). The ONE deliberate plain-http surface is the cockpit's own page (7700+off, not in M213's serve front list — an http launcher -> https demo is not mixed content); fronting it is an M215 live-acceptance polish.
delivered.urls_ts_residual: next-web urls.ts WEB_APP_URL/HIRING_APP_URL: DOCUMENTED RESIDUAL, evidence-decided NOT a demopatch (D-URLS-1). The M42e+M42m coverage sweeps gate at 0 prod-ejects and surfaced only STUDIO_URL+PUBLIC_WEBSITE_URL (both fixed); these two never surfaced (their apps/web usages are public marketing chrome / PDF-SEO / a dead Clerk.provider fallback / hiring-product features — not Workforce demo flows). Adding a speculative demopatch for an unrendered link is gold-plating; the mechanism is proven+ready if a future sweep surfaces one.
delivered.recipe_doc: NEW corpus/ops/demo/tailscale-serve.md (198 lines): the remote-access recipe — the opt-in --public-host flag, the HTTPS-everywhere per-offset-port topology, the tailscale-cert FAPI, the CORS + patch tail, the teammate walkthrough, and the safety framing (Tailscale = the access control; opt-in default-off). + cross-ref updates to rosetta_demo.md / frontend-tier.md / clerkenstein.md / demo/README.md.

Tests: stack-injection/tests/test_injection.py, demo-stack/tests/test_ant_academy.py + test_frontend_build.py.

notes: M214 admits the MagicDNS/HTTPS origin everywhere a browser->backend or cross-surface call is gated, closes the cross-surface link ejects, and lands the bounded platform-family patch tail — all via one scheme predicate flipped by the M212 knob, byte-identical when unset. The one required patch (ant-academy allowedDevOrigins) rides the EXISTING sha-pinned mechanism with env-var indirection (fixed post_sha256, dynamic host); the studio-desk VITE bake gap is closed with a gitignored overlay + transient .dockerignore re-include, both trap-reverted. The conditional next-web urls.ts is the evidence-decided documented residual (0-eject coverage sweeps never surfaced it). Zero platform-repo edits. The build held under harden Pass 1 (+5 shell-behavioral tests, 0 bugs) + 3 close adversarial scenarios (0 defects). rext code-of-record FROZEN at tag panorama-m214 (99c86b7) — the sole close residual (rext README index rows) routes to close-release rather than re-pointing the frozen tag. Runs parallel with the now-closed M213; both feed M215 (prove it on odyssey — the live cross-machine acceptance gate).
